---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the problem or workflow gap. Ex: "I'm frustrated when..."

**Proposed solution**
How you'd like this to work.

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you've thought about.

**Additional context**
Screenshots, links to similar tools, or examples of the feature elsewhere.
